title: stelis lumbricosa
intro: Stelis lumbricosa, also known as the snake flower, is a flowering plant species in the orchid family (Orchidaceae) that is native to Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis lumbricosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
